blocks.text: Sørloth hat-trick fires Atlético through in Champions League
🎮 13:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) leads 100 Thieves vs MANA in DraculaN Season 5
Two ties on the edge tomorrow: Monaco trail PSG 2-3 but one away goal flips the French derby. Benfica must overturn Real Madrid's narrow aggregate lead at home.
